title: Pistis and Potty Mouse's Sprinkle Adventure
summary: Pistis Mouse stays home with Nana while his parents go to the store, spending his time building a complex Lego workplace where mice can learn computer programming. Later, Potty the Mouse embarks on a grand adventure in a miniature toy car, traveling to a specialty store to procure glittering pink sprinkles. Together with his tiny friends, he returns home to bake an array of creative cookies shaped like cats, stars, and radios, even inviting a father mouse to join in the kitchen fun.

highlightQuote.text: They baked the cookie dough and they made the cookie dough, don't forget that part!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, you got the flashlight on.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Tapo, tapo, tapo, tapo, tapo, tapo, tapo...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right, let me turn out the light. Okay, time for stars and stories.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Wipe my nose. Excuse me, bear. I need Melissa's blanket.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, thank you. This is Melissa's blanket?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: When she was a little girl. Yeah, when Melissa was a little girl. She had this blanket.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow. Did you say stars? All right. Where are more cups?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Take those stories. Wipe my nose again, please.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right. There. You want to sit on my lap?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, I want to stand for stars and stories.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. Let's tell a story about how...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Pistis Mouse. Pistis Mouse tried to go to the river in his little car. Yeah, that’s what that story is about.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what happened next?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hmm. Pistis Mouse tried to go to the river in his little car, but he got stuck. Why did he get stuck?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, he didn't get stuck on the way. He just drove into some plants. Now, he's just driving in his car. He's just driving in his car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Was anybody else in the car with him?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know. It was his mama and dada going to the store and Pistis Mouse was staying at home by himself with his nana.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Ah. And what was he doing with his nana?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He was playing with his Legos. They made a building for their mice toys. Wipe my nose.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What was the building for their mice toys?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was a workplace. Scratch. They get with a computer.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, cool. Did they like doing that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, with the scratch cat. And what did they do when they were done with work? They played making pretend tea. Wipe my nose.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What flavor tea did they make?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ginger tea. Ginger tea with hibiscus. That sounds great. Did they have any snacks with their tea? Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: We're going to do one more little story and then it's going to be time to use the potty if you need to, okay?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It will be big. A story about an adventure.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A story about an adventure? Okay. Who's gone on the adventure?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Potty the mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Potty the mouse? Okay. And where's Potty going on the adventure?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: To a sprinkle store in his most tiny car, his pretend toy car. He's taking his mice toys in a little tea car... toy car. That's what he was doing.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A sprinkle store. And what kind of sprinkles are they going to buy there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Glittering sprinkles. They're going to be brown with white frosting and they was going to buy pink sprinkles too to make a cat cookie, a star cookie, a radio cookie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: So they brought all their sprinkles home to make their cookies. And then what did they do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They got the cookies out of the fridge. They baked the cookie dough and they made the cookie dough, don't forget that part! They made the cookies. They made the cookies.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Pistis mouse helping too. And their dad came along, said "Could I have help make it?"

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what did they say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You could! Of course! said his dad. Of course you could help. Yeah. And he said of course. And their dad helped them make the cookies. Now time to turn off the stars.

characters.name: Pistis Mouse
characters.description: An adventurous mouse who enjoys driving his car and building workspaces for his toys.

characters.name: Potty the Mouse
characters.description: A tiny mouse who takes his toy car to the sprinkle store for baking supplies.

characters.name: Nana
characters.description: The dignified mole matriarch and grandmother to Hattie, Pistis, and Isabella, this pillar of watchful wisdom resides at the end of the train line, tackling life’s problems "one at a time." From engineering mouse-scale Lego structures to the meticulous restoration of dollhouses using patient glue and tiny pencils, her steady paws bridge the gap between architectural feats and delicate artistry. Whether discerning potential as a trolley passenger or welcoming weary travelers into her sanctuary, her quiet authority is so legendary that she graces the cover of Hattie’s book in a rare, peaceful slumber. Even in rest, she remains the heart of their world—a steady warmth anchoring every journey’s end, her sharp eyes softening for Izzy’s mushroom-textured crafts.

characters.name: Mama
characters.description: Pistis Mouse’s mother, the architect of the naming that defined her daughter, is a maternal mole who slips away to the store by day and is currently away at the hospital. She remains the quiet destination at the journey’s end: a presence anchored to an upstairs chair, waiting to beckon her kitten into the velvet warmth of her lap for a soft, lingering embrace.

characters.name: Dada
characters.description: Pistis Mouse's father who goes on shopping errands.

characters.name: Mouse Friends
characters.description: A group of teeny tiny mouse toys that join Potty the Mouse on his adventures.

characters.name: The Father
characters.description: A character in the story who politely asks to join the baking session and helps finish the cookies.

places.name: The River
places.description: A mirror-still waterway tracking the edge of the dense jungle path, known to locals as the challenging destination where Pistis Mouse ventures to test the mettle of his little car.

places.name: The Workplace
places.description: A building made of Legos where mouse toys use computers to learn programming with the Scratch cat.

places.name: The Sprinkle Store
places.description: A specialty shop where mice purchase glittering pink and brown toppings for their baked goods.
